description: With unique design and contemporary innovation, police display their street fashion vocation. This watch is designed for trendy, non-conformist, and off-beat individuals who want to keep their own time. Choose this watch to express your excellent taste and attention to detail.Case diameter: 39 mmCase thickness: 8 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: Two yearsStainless steel round case with crystal embellishmentsBlack rubber strap with a tang claspWhite dial with copper handsPolice branding on the dialCrystal embellishments on the dialScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing
